# function: cidr_version

<!-- Edit here: this is the MarkdownDescription source for the burnham cidr_version function. docs/functions/cidr_version.md is generated from it by "go generate ./..."; do not edit the generated doc. -->

Returns `4` for IPv4 prefixes and `6` for IPv6 prefixes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
// 4 or 6 for a CIDR.
output "family" {
  value = provider::burnham::cidr_version("10.0.0.0/8")
  // → 4
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
cidr_version(cidr string) number
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `cidr` (String) The CIDR to inspect.
